one_time_description: COVID-19 pandemic noted as significant event in March 2020 with uncertain financial impact on operations
economic_notes: Nation has multiple business enterprises including Coast Salish Development Corporation, Ivy Green Petroleum LP, Thuthiqut Resources LP, Thuy'she'num Investments LP, Thuy'she'num Property Management LP, and Deer Point Developments LP. Gaming revenue of $565,603 recorded in 2020. Investment in BC Gaming of $110 made during the year.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Nation consolidates 3 entities: Stu'ate Lelum Secondary School and Chemainus Native College, CMHC Social Housing Program, and 1089106 B.C. Ltd. Six business enterprises accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs). COVID-19 noted as significant event. Gaming revenue of $565,603 is new in 2020 (not in 2019). Fisheries and Oceans Canada shows $0 actual vs $72,110 budget; $89,090 in prior year. Earnings from business entities decreased from $3,580,280 to $2,383,643. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + FNESC + Coast Salish Employment and Training Society + CMHC + Fisheries and Oceans Canada = 8,960,000 + 1,779,815 + 1,109,255 + 1,441,252 + 393,762 + 145,934 + 0 = 13,830,018. OSR includes earnings from business entities, gaming revenue, other revenue, rental income, and trust fund interest. No remuneration schedule found in provided text. Annual debt service reflects repayments only; new advances of $662,415 also occurred.
